name: architect
description: SDLC S3 (Design). Validate spec → thiết kế giải pháp kỹ thuật đầy đủ. Trigger: /s3

resources.name: SteeringDocs
resources.description: Project conventions and SDLC rules. Search: "Response Format", "HTTP status", "DB naming", "DESIGN REVIEW", "cost escalation", "AC-ID", "test coverage".

resources.name: AIRules
resources.description: Backend coding rules for NestJS + Prisma + DDD (5 files). Search: "use case rules", "aggregate rules", "port rules", "error handling", "concurrency", "security headers", "input validation", "sonar policy", "sonar rules", "code smell", "cognitive complexity", "AI behavior", "agent guidelines".

resources.name: ParityRules
resources.description: MANDATORY for any design decision touching response format, error codes, voucher state, cache TTLs, brute-force config, or HTTP status. 15 bug-for-bug preservation rules. Search keywords: "parity", "verbatim", "typo vảo Gía", "state 11", "HTTP 200 brute force", "FAILED_ATTEMPS", "APP_TIMEZONE", "scheme_budget TTL", "Compound prefix". Each rule is a non-negotiable constraint on design.

resources.name: Glossary
resources.description: Term definitions only. Search ONLY when encountering an unfamiliar term: PSR-4 hijack, bridge worker, Compound prefix, CONTRACT vs ACCIDENT, biz.configure, Conformist, Customer/Supplier, Shared Kernel, Port/Adapter.

resources.name: Dev-Onboarding
resources.description: Architecture roadmap: layered DDD, 7 bounded contexts, dependency rule, first-endpoint walkthrough, 16-file deep reading list. Use as compass at start of S3.

resources.name: PhpContract-Design
resources.description: PHP behavior contract — anchor design to verbatim source. 8 files. Search: response shape per endpoint (02), state machine quirks (03), Cache TTL trap Compound prefix (05), HTTP 200 contract (06), magic numbers + biz.configure keys (07), PSR-4 hijack vendor inventory (08). Use to validate ADRs.

resources.name: BusinessDomain
resources.description: Domain model to design against. 6 files. Search: "context map relationship", "aggregate invariant", "use case orchestration", "conditional rule expression engine", "redemption calculator". Required for design.md domain sections.

resources.name: Architecture
resources.description: PRIMARY design artifacts. 9 files. Tech stack decisions (01), domain layer DO/DON'T (02), dependency direction enforcement (03), port interfaces (04), execution step-by-step per use case (05), transaction boundaries (06), error model with vendor exception → return_code mapping (07), 11 anti-patterns (08), 38 implementation constraints (09). PRIMARY source for ADR + design.md.

resources.name: Mapping
resources.description: PHP→Node translation strategy. 7 files. Search: "method mapping" PHP method → Node file (01), "vendor package strategy" 7 packages × 4 strategies (02), "Prisma db pull biz.* cross-DB" (03), "external API Fee Tracking FraudStream" (04), "event queue bridge worker" (05), "Prometheus replication" (06), "infrastructure topology Redis prefix" (07). Required for design.md tech sections.

resources.name: OpenAPI
resources.description: OpenAPI 3.0 spec for 4 endpoints — authoritative response/request schemas. Architect owns updates here when API changes.

resources.name: SpecsHistory
resources.description: Existing feature specs. Search for existing design patterns, ADRs, DB schemas from previous features.

stop.command: echo '' && echo '=== Uncommitted ===' && git diff --stat specs/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true

userPromptSubmit.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
msg=d.get('user_message','')
m=re.search(r'\b(\d{4,6})\b',msg)
if m: print(f'[Auto-context] ticket_id detected: {m.group(1)}')
" 2>/dev/null||true

welcomeMessage: Architect sẵn sàng. Dùng /s3 {ticket_id} {feature-slug} để bắt đầu thiết kế.
